## DNMT3A HESJAS ageing

This repo contains figures and extended data figures for our paper describing HESJAS as a progeria syndrome linking DNA methylation with ageing.

This repo has the following subdirectories:

* data: contains data used to generate figures for the paper.

* figure_plots: contains figures generated by R scr.

* Rmd: contains R markdown notebooks for generating R based figures for the paper.

* scr: contains R scripts to generate the Rmd.
